user.title: Google Find My Device
user.description: Enter your Google account credentials. You need an App Password (not your regular password). Go to myaccount.google.com > Security > 2-Step Verification > App passwords to create one.

data_description.app_password: App-specific password generated from your Google account
data_description.poll_interval: How often to refresh device locations (60-3600 seconds)

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Make sure you're using an App Password, not your regular password.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Google account is already configured.
